title: fragaria nipponica subsp. yakusimensis
intro: Fragaria nipponica subsp. yakusimensis is a subspecies of wild strawberry native to the Yakushima Island in Japan, known for its unique and fragrant flavor. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fragaria nipponica subsp. yakusimensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in skincare products due to its astringent and soothing properties.
